config.rationale: Testing SGLang with NEXTN speculative decoding using the model's built-in MTP layers, as requested. This leverages has_mtp=true for potential throughput gains. Increased max_prefill_tokens to 8192 to better utilize chunked prefill with higher concurrency. Using prefix caching which is beneficial for speculative decoding.

llm_commentary: The SGLang experiment with NEXTN speculative decoding failed to produce any results, likely due to configuration incompatibilities or instability with the speculative algorithm. This failure provides no new performance data to improve upon the current VLLM-dominated leaderboards, which show strong throughput (3023.4) and excellent latency (58.5ms) results.
